propertyName.en: Relative time setting for keeping bath temperature

note.ja: 秒の指定は無視される
note.en: Number of seconds is ignored.

propertyName.ja: エネルギーシフト参加状態

descriptions.ja: エネルギーシフトへの対応を示す。「参加要請確定時刻」に、値が確定し、沸き上げシフト時刻にクリア(0x00)される
descriptions.en: This property indicates a response in energy shift. The value is set when a value is determined at participation request and cleared at the heating shift time (0x00).

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

propertyName.ja: 沸き上げ開始基準時刻

descriptions.ja: 「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1及び昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2(エネルギーシフトの回数が2回の機器のみ)」を確定する時刻
descriptions.en: Time when daytime heating shift time 1 and daytime heating shift time 2 are determined (only for devices that carry out energy shifts twice).

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

propertyName.ja: エネルギーシフト回数

descriptions.ja: エネルギーシフトする回数を確認する
descriptions.en: Check the number of energy shifts carried out

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

note.en: Once/twice (0x01, 0x02)

propertyName.ja: 昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1

descriptions.ja: 1回目の「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻」を示す。また、未設定時の値を0x00と定義する
descriptions.en: This property indicates 'daytime heating shift time' for the first time. The value when there are no settings shall be defined as 0x00.

descriptions.ja: 17時(エネルギーシフト回数が2回の場合はこの値無効になる)
descriptions.en: 17:00 (this value is nullified if energy shifts occur twice.)

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

propertyName.ja: 昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1での沸き上げ予測電力量
propertyName.en: Expected electric energy at daytime heating shift time 1

descriptions.ja: 「昼間沸き上げ開始基準時刻」に設定された「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1」での沸き上げに要する電力量予測値1を示すシフト時刻に応じ、順に10時、13時、15時､17時の各時刻に対応する電力量をWhで示す「シフト時刻毎消費電力確定時刻」に値が確定し、「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1」に、時刻毎のデータはクリア(0x00000000)される
descriptions.en: This property indicates the expected electric energy 1 required for heating for 'daytime heating shift time 1' set as 'daytime standard time to start heating'.This property indicates electric power in Wh according to shift time, corresponding to these times in sequence: 10:00, 13:00, 15:00, and 17:00.The value is set when a value is determined at a time to determine consumption of electric energy at every shift time and a data at every time is cleared (0x00000000) at the daytime heating shift time 1.

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

propertyName.ja: 時間あたり消費電力量1
propertyName.en: Consumption of electric energy per hour 1

descriptions.ja: 「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1」にシフトした時にHP給湯機が、時間当たりに消費する電力量1を示す「シフト時刻毎消費電力確定時刻」に値が確定し、「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻1」に、時刻毎データはクリア(0x0000)される
descriptions.en: This property indicates electric energy 1 that the HP water heater consumes per hour when shifting to 'daytime heating shift time 1'.The value is set when a value is determined at a time to determine consumption of electric energy at every shift time and a data at every time is cleared (0x0000) at the daytime heating shift time 1.

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract.

propertyName.ja: 昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2

descriptions.ja: 2回目の「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻」を示す。また、未設定時の値を0x00と定義する
descriptions.en: This property indicates 'daytime heating shift time' for the second time. The value when no setting shall be defined as 0x00.

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする。エネルギーシフト回数が2回である機器は搭載必須とする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract. Devices with two energy shifts must implement this function.

propertyName.ja: 昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2での沸き上げ予測電力量
propertyName.en: Expected electric energy at daytime heating shift time 2

descriptions.ja: 「昼間沸き上げ開始基準時刻」に設定された「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2」での沸き上げに要するシフト2回目の電力量予測値2を示すシフト時刻に応じ、順に13時、15時､17時の各時刻に対応する電力量をWhで示す「シフト時刻毎消費電力確定時刻」に、値が確定し、「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2」に、各時刻毎データはクリア(0x00000000)される
descriptions.en: This property indicates expected electric energy 2 required for heating (for second time in the shift) for 'daytime heating shift time 2' set as 'daytime standard time to start heating'.This property indicates electric power in Wh according to shift time, corresponding to these times in sequence: 13:00, 15:00, and 17:00.The value is set when a value is determined at a time to determine consumption of electric energy at every shift time and a data at every time is cleared (0x00000000) at the daytime heating shift time 2.

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする。エネルギーシフト回数が2回である機器は搭載必須とする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract. Devices with two energy shifts must implement this function.

propertyName.ja: 時間あたり消費電力量2
propertyName.en: Consumption of electric energy per hour 2

descriptions.ja: 「昼間沸き上げシフト時刻2」にシフトした時にHP給湯機が、時間当たり消費電力量2を示す「シフト時刻毎消費電力確定時刻」に、値が確定し、「昼間沸き上されるげシフト時刻2」に、各時刻毎データはクリア(0x0000)される
descriptions.en: This property indicates electric energy 2 that the HP water heater consumes per hour when shifting 'daytime heating shift time 2'.The value is set when a value is determined at a time to determine consumption of electric energy at every shift time and a data at every time is cleared (0x0000) at the daytime heating shift time 2.

remark.ja: サービス提供者と本クラス搭載機器の利用者間で、エネルギーシフト(昼間沸き上げ)に対し合意が得られている前提で利用する。また、沸き上げ開始基準時刻は、契約時に決定されていることとする。エネルギーシフト回数が2回である機器は搭載必須とする
remark.en: Use the device on the assumption that an agreement between service provider and user of devices implementing this class is obtained for energy shift (daytime heating). Note that the standard time to start heating may be determined when establishing a contract. Devices with two energy shifts must implement this function.

descriptions.ja: 電気自動車充放電器に接続された電気自動車の車載電池の放電可能容量をWhで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the dischargeable capacity of a vehicle battery connected to an electric vehicle charger/discharger in Wh.

remark.ja: 車載電池の放電可能容量値1 は、電気自動車充放電器に接続された電気自動車から出力される場合、搭載を必須とする。応答できない状況にある場合、不可応答を返す
remark.en: The installation of 'Dischargeable capacity of vehicle mounted battery 1' is mandatory in case of output from an electric vehicle connected to an electric vehicle charger/discharger. Where no response can be returned, 'Response impossible' is returned.

remark.ja: 充放電器タイプのDC_タイプAA、DC_タイプBB、DC_タイプEE 及びDC_タイプFFは、IEC 62196-3 にて規定されているConfiguration AA、Configuration BB、Configuration EE 及びConfiguration FF に記載の形状のコネクタを有する電気自動車充放電器とする
remark.en: DC_type AA, DC_type BB, DC_type EE and DC_type FF chargers/dischargers shall be electric vehicle chargers/dischargers with connectors of the shape specified in Configuration AA, Configuration BB, Configuration EE and Configuration FF as defined in IEC 62196-3.

note.ja: 充放電器タイプのDC_タイプAA、DC_タイプBB、DC_タイプEE 及びDC_タイプFFは、IEC 62196-3 にて規定されているConfiguration AA、Configuration BB、Configuration EE 及びConfiguration FF に記載の形状のコネクタを有する電気自動車充放電器とする
note.en: DC_type AA, DC_type BB, DC_type EE and DC_type FF chargers/dischargers shall be electric vehicle chargers/dischargers with connectors of the shape specified in Configuration AA, Configuration BB, Configuration EE and Configuration FF as defined in IEC 62196-3.

descriptions.ja: 運転モード設定(EPC=0xDA)に充電(0x42)，待機（0x44）、充放電0x46）を設定した時の充電方式を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the charging method when setting Charging (0x42), Standby (0x44) or Charging/Discharging (0x46) to the operation mode setting (EPC=0xDA).

descriptions.ja: 運転モード設定(EPC=0xDA)に放電(0x43)，待機（0x44）、充放電0x46）を設定した時の充電方式を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the discharging method when setting Discharging (0x43), Standby (0x44) or Charging/Discharging (0x46) to the operation mode setting (EPC=0xDA).

descriptions.ja: 運転モード設定(EPC=0xDA)に放電(0x43)，待機（0x44）、充放電0x46）を設定した時の充電方式を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the discharging method when setting Discharging (0x43), Standby (0x44) or Charging/Discharging (0x46) to the operation mode setting (EPC=0xDA).

descriptions.ja: 買電電力の上限値をWで指定する。充電方式が買電電力指定充電(0x05)または放電方式が買電電力指定放電(0x05)の場合有効になる
descriptions.en: This property specifies the upper limit of the purchasing electric power in W. This shall be effective when charging method is designated purchasing electric power charging (0x05), or discharging method is designated purchasing electric power discharging (0x05).

descriptions.ja: 系統への連系の許可、禁止を設定する
descriptions.en: This property sets permission and prohibition for interconnection to system.

descriptions.ja: 充電方式プロパティ、および放電方式プロパティが V2G である場合の充放電の電力をWで指定する
descriptions.en: This property specifies charging or discharging electric power in "W" when the value of charging method property or discharging method property is V2G (0x06).

note.ja: プロパティの値域 は、0x00000001～0x3B9AC9FF (1～999,999,999)：充電時(プラス値)、0xFFFFFFFF～0xC4653601 (－1～－999,999,999)：放電時(マイナス値)とする。なお、充放電電力設定値のプロパティ値は、書き込み要求受信時以外は変更しない値とする。充電方式プロパティ(0xDC)のプロパティ値がV2G (0x06)である場合、もしくは放電方式プロパティ(0xDC)のプロパティ値がV2G (0x06)である場合に、本プロパティのプロパティ値が正の数値である書き込み要求を受信した場合、運転モード設定(0xDA)を充電(0x42)とする。本プロパティのプロパティ値が負の数値である書き込み要求を受信した場合、運転モード設定(0xDA)を放電(0x43)とする。本プロパティのプロパティ値が0x00である書き込み要求を受信した場合、運転モード設定(0xDA)を待機(0x44)とする。充電方式プロパティ(0xDC)がV2G (0x06)以外の時に、本プロパティのプロパティ値が0もしく正の値である書き込み要求を受信しても、運転モード設定プロパティおよび本プロパティのプロパティ値は変更しない。また、放電方式プロパティ(0xDD)がV2G (0x06)以外の時に、本プロパティのプロパティ値が0もしく負の値である書き込み要求を受信しても、運転モード設定プロパティおよび本プロパティのプロパティ値は変更しない
note.en: This property specifies the charging/discharging electric power in watts. The property value range shall be 0x00000001 to 0x3B9AC9FF (1 to 999,999,999): charging (positive), 0xFFFFFFFF to 0xC4653601 (-1 to -999,999,999W): discharging (negative). The property value of the charging/discharging electric power setting shall be a value that is not changed except when a write request is received. When the value of the charging method property (0xDC) is V2G (0x06) or the value of the discharging method property (0xDD) is V2G (0x06), the operation mode setting property (0xDA) shall be set to charging (0x42) if a write request specifying a positive value for this property is received. The operation mode setting property (0xDA) shall be set to discharging (0x43) if a write request specifying a negative value for this property is received. The operation mode setting property (0xDA) shall be set to standby (0x44) if a write request specifying zero for this property is received. When the value of the charging method property (0xDC) is other than V2G (0x06), the values of the operation mode setting property and this property shall not be changed even if a write request specifying a positive value or zero for this property is received. When the value of the discharging method property (0xDD) is other than V2G (0x06), the values of the operation mode setting property and this property shall not be changed even if a write request specifying a negative value or zero for this property is received.

descriptions.ja: 電気自動車充放電器の動作状態を示す。本プロパティ搭載時、「充電状態」、「放電状態」、「待機状態もしくは停止状態」の各運転動作状態は必須とする
descriptions.en: This property indicates the operating status of an electric vehicle charger/discharger. If this property is implemented, charge, discharge and at least one of standby and idle are required to be implemented as property values.

propertyName.ja: 車載電池の電池残容量1
propertyName.en: Remaining stored electricity of vehicle mounted battery1

descriptions.ja: 電気自動車充放電器に接続された電気自動車の車載電池の残容量をWhで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the remaining stored capacity of a vehicle battery connected to an electric vehicle charger/discharger in Wh.

remark.ja: 車載電池の電池残容量1、車載電池の電池残容量3 は、電気自動車充放電器に接続された電気自動車から出力される場合、いずれかの搭載を必須とする。応答できない状況にある場合、不可応答を返す
remark.en: The installation of 'Remaining stored electricity of vehicle mounted battery 1' or 'Remaining stored electricity of vehicle mounted battery 3' is mandatory in case of output from an electric vehicle connected to an electric vehicle charger/discharger. Where no response can be returned, 'Response impossible' is returned.

note.ja: 車載電池の電池残容量1、車載電池の電池残容量3 は、電気自動車充放電器に接続された電気自動車から出力される場合、いずれかの搭載を必須とする。応答できない状況にある場合、不可応答を返す
note.en: The installation of 'Remaining stored electricity of vehicle mounted battery 1' or 'Remaining stored electricity of vehicle mounted battery 3' is mandatory in case of output from an electric vehicle connected to an electric vehicle charger/discharger. Where no response can be returned, 'Response impossible' is returned.

descriptions.ja: 積算水流量消費量の計測結果履歴を、30 分毎データを過去24 時間で示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the historical data of measured cumulative amount (consumptions) of running water, which consists of 48 pieces of halfhourly data for the preceding 24 hours.

remark.ja: 計測値に0xE1 から算出された値を乗算し、1000倍し、少数部分を切り捨てた値。
remark.en: Each value is caluculated by multiplying measured value by the value from 0xE1, then multiplying 1000, then rounding down.

propertyName.en: Measured instantaneous amount of electric energy

descriptions.ja: 電力実効値の瞬時値をWで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous amount of electric energy in watts.

descriptions.ja: 実効電流値の瞬時値をAでR相T相を並べて示す単相2線式の場合は、T相に0x7FFEをセット
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous R and T phase currents in amperes.In the case of a single-phase, two-wire system, 0x7FFE shall be used for the T phase.

descriptions.ja: 実効電圧値の瞬時値をVでR-S(N)間、S(N)‐T間を並べて示す。単相2線式の場合は、S(N)-T間に0xFFFEをセット
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous R-S(N) and S(N)-T voltages in volts. In the case of a single-phase, two-wire system, 0xFFFE shall be used for the S(N)-T voltage.

className.ja: 低圧スマート電力量メータ

descriptions.ja: 低圧スマート電力量メータをドメイン内で一意に識別するための番号
descriptions.en: This property indicates a number that allows low-voltage smart electric energy meters to be uniquely identified in the domain.

remark.ja: 日本国内における低圧スマート電力量メータは、本プロパティを搭載必須とする。日本国内では以下の値域である 1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
remark.en: Low-voltage smart electric energy meters in Japan must be equipped with this property.The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

note.ja: 日本国内では以下の値域である 1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
note.en: The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

propertyName.ja: 1分積算電力量計測値（正方向、逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: One-minute measured cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 最新の1分毎の計測時刻における積算電力量を、計測年月日を4バイト、計測時刻を3バイト、積算電力量（正方向計測値）4バイト、積算電力量（逆方向計測値）4バイトで示す。・計測年月日　YYYY:MM:DD・計測時刻　hh:mm:ss・積算電力量(正方向)　10進表記で最大8桁・積算電力量(逆方向)　10進表記で最大8桁
descriptions.en: This property indicates the most recent cumulative amount of electric energy measured at 1-minute intervals held by the meter in the format of 4 bytes for date of measurement, 3 bytes for time of measurement, and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (normal direction), and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (reverse direction).・Date of measurement: YYYY:MM:DD・Measurement time: hh:mm:ss・Cumulative electric energy (normal direction): maximum 8 digits in decimal notation・Cumulative electric energy (reverse direction): maximum 8 digits in decimal notation

elementName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(正方向)
elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (normal direction)

elementName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(逆方向)
elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (reverse direction)

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値、履歴を実使用量に換算する係数を10進表記において6桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the coefficient for converting measured cumulative amount of electric energy and historical data to actual usage amount using a 6-digit decimal notation.

propertyName.en: Number of effective digits for cumulative amounts of electric energy

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値の有効桁数を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the number of effective digits for measured cumulative amounts of electric energy.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値 (正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量を10進表記において、最大8桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured cumulative amount of electric energy using an 8-digit decimal notation number.

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量単位 (正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値、履歴の単位(乗率)を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the unit (multiplying factor) used for the measured cumulative amount of electric energy and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴1 (正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 1 (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日1と該当収集日の24時間48コマ分(0時0分～23時30分)の正方向の定時積算電力量計測値の履歴データを時系列順に上位バイトからプロパティ値として示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 1 and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (normal direction), which consists of 48 items of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours (00:00 to 23:30) of the day by time series from the highest-order byte.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。電力量はEPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). Electric power is multipled by EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction)

propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 1 (reverse direction)

descriptions.en: This property indicates the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 1 and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (reverse direction), which consists of 48 items of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours (00:00 to 23:30) of the day by time series from the highest-order byte.

descriptions.en: This property indicates measured cumulative amount of electric energy (normal direction) for the duration of 00:00 and 23:30 at every 30 minute on the day specified by the EPC: 0xE0.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: あらかじめ EPC=0xE0 に値を Set すること。
remark.en: EPC=0xE0 should be set before accessing this property

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値（逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値（逆方向計測値）
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction)

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴（逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日 (0xE0) の30分毎 (00:00 ～ 23:30) の積算電力量計測値（逆方向）を取得する。
descriptions.en: This property indicates measured cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction) for the duration of 00:00 and 23:30 at every 30 minute on the day specified by the EPC: 0xE0.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: あらかじめ EPC=0xE0 に値を Set すること。
remark.en: EPC=0xE0 should be set before accessing this property

descriptions.ja: 電力実効値の瞬時値を示す。変圧器(VT)及び変流器(CT)付き計器の場合には2次側の電力計測値。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous electric power. In case the device has voltage transformer (VT) and/or current transformer (CT), the value at the secondary side shall be used.

descriptions.ja: 実効電流値の瞬時値 (R相およびT相) を示す。単相2線式の場合はT相の値は0x7FFE。変流器(CT)付き計器の場合には2次側の電流計測値。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous currents (R and T phase ). In case of a two-wire single-phase power line, the value of T phase is 0x7FFE. In case the device has current transformer (CT), the value at the secondary side shall be used.

descriptions.ja: 実効電圧値の瞬時値 (R-S(N)間,S(N)-T間) を示す。単相2線式の場合はS(N)-T間の値は0xFFFE。変圧器(VT)付き計器の場合には2次側の値。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous voltages (R-S(N) and S(N)-T). In case of a two-wire single-phase power line, the value of S(N)-T is 0xFFFE. In case the device has voltage transformer (VT), the value at the secondary side shall be used.

propertyName.ja: 定時積算電力量計測値（正方向計測値）
propertyName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured at fixed time(normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 30分毎の最新の計測時刻における積算電力量(正方向計測値)
descriptions.en: The latest cumulative amount of electric energy (normal direction) at every 30 minute

elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured

propertyName.ja: 定時積算電力量計測値（逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured at fixed time(reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 30分毎の最新の計測時刻における積算電力量(逆方向計測値)
descriptions.en: The latest cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction) at every 30 minute

elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured

className.ja: 分散型電源電力量メータ

descriptions.ja: 計量対象の機器(発電設備等)のクラスグループコード、クラスコード、系統連携方式
descriptions.en: Class group code, class code, and system interconnection type for devices to be measured (power generating unit, etc.)).

note.ja: 1バイト目はクラスグループコード。2バイト目はクラスコード。3バイト目は系統連携方式(0x00：系統連携方式、0x01：スタンドアロン方式)
note.en: 1st data is class group code. 2nd data is class code and 3rd data is system interconnection type (0x00: system interconnected type, 0x01: stand-alone type).

descriptions.ja: 計量対象の機器を特定するID
descriptions.en: ID to identify devices to be measured

note.ja: 1～6バイト目：ECHONET LiteノードのMACアドレス、7バイト目：ECHONET Liteノードに搭載される分散型電源電力量メータを識別する番号
note.en: 1st–6th byte: MAC address of ECHONET Lite node, 7th byte: Number that identifies the decentralized electric energy meter implemented in the ECHONET Lite node.

descriptions.ja: 計量対象の機器(発電設備等)の公差階級
descriptions.en: Tolerance class of the device to be measured (power generating unit, etc.)

note.ja: 発電設備等の計測する計量精度を、特定計量制度に係るガイドラインに定められる、取引規模に応じた公差の階級で示す。
note.en: The measurement accuracy of the power generating unit, etc., is shown as a tolerance class according to the scale of transactions, as specified in the Guidelines on Specific Measurement Scheme.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴保持日数
propertyName.en: Number of days to retain historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴の最大保持日数
descriptions.en: Maximum number of days to retain historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy)

note.ja: 0x0000(0)は当日の履歴のみを持つ。0x0001(1)は当日＋前日の履歴を持つ。0x0063(99)は当日＋99日前までの履歴を持つ
note.en: 0x0000(0) has the history of the current day only. 0x0001(1) has the history of the current day and the previous day. 0x0063(99) has the history of the current day through 99 days earlier.

propertyName.en: Unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量単位(交流出力、交流入力、自立出力)
descriptions.en: Unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC output, AC input and output during a power outage)

propertyName.en: Day on which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved

descriptions.ja: 30 分毎の計測値履歴データを収集する日
descriptions.en: This property indicates the day on which the historical data of measured cumulative amount of electric energy (which consists of 48 pieces of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours) is to be retrieved.

remark.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴を保持する分散型電源電力量メータは搭載を必須とする。
remark.en: Distributed generator's electric energy meters that retain historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy must implement this property.

note.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴(EPC=0xE1、0xE3、0xE5)の積算履歴収集日を設定する。0x0000(0)は当日(前時限値まで)の計測データ。0x0063(99)は99日前の履歴を持つ
note.en: This property specifies the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (EPC=0xE1, 0xE3, 0xE5) is to be retrieved. 0x0000 (0): specifies the data on the current day (up to the last hour). 0x0063 (99) specifies the data on the day 99 days before.

propertyName.ja: 計量対象機器識別番号
propertyName.en: Identification number of device to be metered

descriptions.ja: 計量対象機器の識別番号
descriptions.en: Identification number of device to be metered

note.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2～4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値
note.en: 1st data is 0xFE. 2nd to 4th data is manufacture code. The rest should be unique to each device.

propertyName.en: Current hour, minute, and second setting

remark.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴を保持する分散型電源電力量メータは搭載を必須とする。
remark.en: Distributed generator's electric energy meters that retain historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy must implement this property.

descriptions.ja: NTPサーバ等との時刻同期の状態を示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the status of time synchronization with NTP servers, etc.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(交流入力)
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC input)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量を10進表記において、9桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates cumulative amounts of electric energy in decimal (9 digits).

remark.ja: 積算電力量計測値は稼働時からの累積値とし、単位は積算電力量単位のプロパティで示す。積算電力量計測値(交流入力)と積算電力量計測値(交流出力)は何れかの搭載を必須とする
remark.en: The measured cumulative amounts of electric energy shall be a cumulative amount from the beginning of operation and its unit is indicated in the unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy property. Either the implement measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC input) or the integrated measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC output) must be installed.

note.ja: 0xD4の値を乗算する必要あり
note.en: It is necessary to mutiply the value of 0xD4.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴(交流入力)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC input)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日 (0xD5) の30分毎 (00:00 ～ 23:30) の積算電力量計測値(交流入力)を取得する。
descriptions.en: This property indicates measured cumulative amount of electric energy (AC Input) for the duration of 00:00 and 23:30 at every 30 minute on the day specified by the EPC: 0xD5.

elementName.en: Day on which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: 積算電力量計測値は稼働時からの累積値とし、単位は積算電力量単位のプロパティで示す。交流入力を計測し履歴を保持する分散型電源電力量メータは搭載を必須とする。計測データなしは、当日の未来時刻、計量開始以前、計量部異常による未計測、時刻合わせによる時刻飛び、停電等による未計測の場合等である
remark.en: The measured cumulative amounts of electric energy shall be a cumulative amount from the beginning of operation and its unit is indicated in the unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy  property. Distributed generator’s electric energy meters that measure and retain AC input must implement this property. No measured data is lack of data in the cases such as for the future time of the day, for the time before the start of measurement, unable to measure due to an error of metering unit, for the skipped time caused by time synchronization, unable to measure due to system power failure, etc.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(交流出力)
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC output)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量を10進表記において、9桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates cumulative amounts of electric energy in decimal (9 digits).

remark.ja: 積算電力量計測値は稼働時からの累積値とし、単位は積算電力量単位のプロパティで示す。積算電力量計測値(交流入力)と積算電力量計測値(交流出力)は何れかの搭載を必須とする。スタンドアロン方式蓄電システム(系統から受電して、蓄電池に充電し、蓄電池からの放電を出力用端子又はコンセントから給電する方式の蓄電システム)における蓄電エネルギー運転時の出力や、電気自動車等からの放電を出力量端子又はコンセントから出力する場合も交流出力として扱う
remark.en: The measured cumulative amounts of electric energy shall be a cumulative amount from the beginning of operation and its unit is indicated in the unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy property. Either the implement measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC input) or the integrated measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC output) must be installed. Stand-alone type storage battery system (a battery system that receives power to charge and discharges to the load from a dedicated output terminal or outlet) in a better discharge operation mode. As an AC output. Discharge from the EV via the dedicated output terminal or outlet is also treated as AC output.

note.ja: 0xD4の値を乗算する必要あり
note.en: It is necessary to mutiply the value of 0xD4.

propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (AC output)

remark.en: The measured cumulative amounts of electric energy shall be a cumulative amount from the beginning of operation and its unit is indicated in the unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy  property. Distributed generator’s electric energy meters that measure and retain AC output must implement this property. Stand-alone type storage battery system (a battery system that receives power to charge and discharges to the load from a dedicated output terminal or outlet) in a better discharge operation mode. No measured data is lack of data in the cases such as for the future time of the day, for the time before the start of measurement, unable to measure due to an error of metering unit, for the skipped time caused by time synchronization, unable to measure due to system power failure, etc.

descriptions.en: This property indicates the effective instantaneous electric power (AC input/output) in units of 1W.

remark.ja: スタンドアロン方式蓄電システム(系統から受電して、蓄電池に充電し、蓄電池からの放電を出力用端子又はコンセントから給電する方式の蓄電システム)における蓄電エネルギー運転時の出力や、電気自動車等からの放電を出力量端子又はコンセントから出力する場合も交流出力として扱う。

As an AC output. Discharge from the EV via the dedicated output terminal or outlet is also treated as AC output.

propertyName.ja: 瞬時電力計測値(自立出力)
propertyName.en: Measured instantaneous electric power (output during a power outage)

descriptions.ja: 自立出力の電力実効値の瞬時値を1W単位で示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the effective instantaneous electric power (output during a power outage) in units of 1W.

className.ja: 双方向対応高圧スマート電力量メータ
className.en: Bidirectional high voltage smart electric energy meter

descriptions.ja: 高圧スマート電力量メータをドメイン内で一意に識別するための番号
descriptions.en: A number that allows high-voltage smart electric energy meters to be uniquely identified in the domain.

remark.ja: 日本国内における双方向高圧スマート電力量メータは、本プロパティを搭載必須とする。日本国内では以下の値域である。1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
remark.en: Bidirectional high voltage smart electric energy meters in Japan must be equipped with this property.The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

note.ja: 日本国内では以下の値域である。1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
note.en: The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

propertyName.ja: 月間最大需要電力(正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Monthly maximum electric power demand (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 前回確定日から最新の計測時刻までに記録した需要電力の計器指示値の最大値を示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the maximum value of meter readings for electric power demand recorded between the date of the last fixed reading and the most recent measurement time.

note.ja: EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

propertyName.ja: 累積最大需要電力(正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Cumulative maximum electric power demand (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 電力会社との契約上確定した最大需要電力の計器指示値の累積値を示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the cumulative value of meter readings for maximum electric power demand contractually fixed by the electric power company.

note.ja: EPC=0xC7, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC7, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

propertyName.ja: 定時需要電力(30分平均電力)(正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Electric power demand at fixed time (30-minute average electric power) (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 最新の30分毎の計測時刻における需要電力(30分平均電力) の計器指示値を、計測年月日を4バイト、計測時刻を3バイト、需要電力(30分平均電力)(正方向)4バイト、需要電力(30分平均電力)(逆方向)4バイトで示す。 ・計測年月日　YYYY:MM:DD ・計測時刻　　hh:mm:ss ・需要電力　　10進表記で最大8桁
descriptions.en: This property indicates the meter reading for electric power demand (30-minute average electric power) in the most recent half-hourly measurement time, with the measurement date in 4 bytes, measurement time in 3 bytes, electric power demand (30-minute average electric power) (normal direction) in 4 bytes, and electric power demand (30-minute average electric power) (reverse direction) in 4 bytes. ・Date of measurement: YYYY:MM:DD ・Measurement time: hh:mm:ss ・Electric power demand　Maximum 8 digits in decimal notation

note.ja: EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

propertyName.en: Number of effective digits of electric power demand

descriptions.ja: 需要電力の有効桁数を示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates the number of effective digits of electric power demand.

descriptions.ja: 月間最大需要電力、定時需要電力(30分平均電力)の単位を示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates units of monthly maximum electric power demand, and electric power demand at fixed time (30-minute average electric power).

propertyName.ja: 需要電力計測値履歴(正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured electric power demand (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日で指定した当該収集日の24時間48コマ分(0時0分～23時30分)の定時需要電力(30分平均電力)の計器指示値の履歴データを時系列順に上位バイトからプロパティ値として示す。
descriptions.en: This property indicates historical data of meter readings for electric power demand at fixed time (30-minute average electric power) on the day specified under “Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved”, equaling 48 pieces of half-hourly data for 24 hours (00:00-23:30) of the day by time series from the highest-order byte.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE1
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE1

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

propertyName.en: Unit of cumulative maximum electric power demand

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを固有に識別する番号。
descriptions.en: A number that allows each object to be uniquely identified.

remark.ja: 1バイト目:下位通信層IDフィールド 0x01~0xFD: 下位通信層で使用される通信プロトコルで固有の番号が振られている場合、プロトコル種別に応じて、任意に設定(ECHONET Liteでは使用しない) 0x11~0x1F:電灯線a,d方式 0x31~0x3F:特定小電力無線 0x41~0x4F:拡張HBS 0x51~0x5F:IrDA 0x61~0x6F:LonTalk 0x71~0x7F:Bluetooth 0x81~0x8F:イーサネット 0x91~0x9F:IEEE802.11/11b 0xA1:電灯線c方式 0xB1:IPv6/Ethernet 0xB2:IPv6/6LoWPAN  0xFE: 2~17バイトをメーカ規定。形式により設定(詳細説明参照) 0xFF: 2~9バイトを乱数により生成するプロトコルを下位通信層で使用する場合に設定 0x00: 識別番号未設定  2バイト目以降:固有番号フィールド
remark.en: The first byte: Lower-layer communication ID field 0x01-0xFD: If a unique number is assigned by the lower-layer communication protocols, an arbitrary ID number is set according to the protocol types. (Not used in ECHONET Lite). 0x11-0x1F: Power line Communication Protocol a and d systems 0x31-0x3F: Low-Power Radio Communication Protocol 0x41-0x4F: Extended HBS 0x51-0x5F: IrDA 0x61-0x6F: LonTalk 0x71-0x7F: Bluetooth 0x81-0x8F: Ethernet 0x91-0x9F: IEEE802.11/11b 0xA1: Power line Communication Protocol c systems 0xB1: IPv6/Ethernet 0xB2: IPv6/6LoWPAN  0xFE: 2nd-17th bytes are defined by the manufacturer according to the product type. (Refer to the detailed explanation.) 0xFF: This ID number is used if 2nd-9th bytes are randomly generated by the lower-layer communication protocols. 0x00: Identification number is not set.  The second and succeeding bytes: unique number field

note.en: Frequency regulation mode and frequency regulation state must be either command control or autonomous control, and EM target value control must be installed.

note.ja: 上位バイトは制御続行の可否状態を示し、下位バイトは制御制限や継続不可の詳細情報を示す。APPENDIXの「制御続行可否詳細情報プロパティ」詳細説明参照
note.en: The upper byte indicates whether control can be continued or not. The lower byte indicates detailed information on control restrictions and continuation impossibility. Refer to "(18) Detailed information of whether the device can continue to control" in APPENDIX.

note.ja: 受電点を制御ポイントとできる機器は、受電点瞬時電力計測値(W)の搭載を必須とし、無効値を許容しない。
note.en: Devices that can use the power receiving point as a control point must implement the instantaneous power measurement value (W) at the power receiving point, and invalid are not allowed.

note.ja: 当該する制御を行っていない場合は無効値とする。

descriptions.en: This property indicates the current battery status.

remark.ja: 充電可能電力量(Wh) 、放電可能電力量(Wh) の搭載を必須とする。また、蓄電残量(DC Wh) と蓄電残量(%) の何れかの搭載を必須とする。なお、非搭載の値は無効値とする。
remark.en: It is mandatory to implement chargeable power (Wh) and dischargeable power (Wh). In addition, it is mandatory to implement either the remaining stored electricity (DC Wh) or the state of charge (%). And non-implemented values should be treated as invalid values.

note.ja: 充電可能電力量(Wh) 、放電可能電力量(Wh) の搭載を必須とする。また、蓄電残量(DC Wh) と蓄電残量(%) の何れかの搭載を必須とする。なお、非搭載の値は無効値とする。
note.en: It is mandatory to implement chargeable power (Wh) and dischargeable power (Wh). In addition, it is mandatory to implement either the remaining stored electricity (DC Wh) or the state of charge (%). And non-implemented values should be treated as invalid values.

remark.ja: 積算入力電力量計測値（機器点順方向 Wh）、積算出力電力量計測値（機器点逆方向 Wh）の搭載を必須とし、非搭載の値は無効値とする。また、受電点を制御ポイントとできる機器は積算系統買電電力量計測値(Wh)、積算系統売電電力量計測値(Wh)の搭載を推奨する。
remark.en: It is mandatory to install the measured cumulative amount of input electric energy (normal direction at device point) (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of output electric energy (reverse direction at device point) (Wh).In addition, it is recommended that devices that can use the power receiving point as a control point should be equipped with the measured cumulative amount of electric energy bought from grid (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of electric energy sold to grid (Wh).

note.ja: 積算入力電力量計測値（機器点順方向 Wh）、積算出力電力量計測値（機器点逆方向 Wh）の搭載を必須とし、非搭載の値は無効値とする。また、受電点を制御ポイントとできる機器は積算系統買電電力量計測値(Wh)、積算系統売電電力量計測値(Wh)の搭載を推奨する。
note.en: It is mandatory to install the measured cumulative amount of input electric energy (normal direction at device point) (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of output electric energy (reverse direction at device point) (Wh).In addition, it is recommended that devices that can use the power receiving point as a control point should be equipped with the measured cumulative amount of electric energy bought from grid (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of electric energy sold to grid (Wh).

descriptions.ja: 洗濯乾燥機の動作運転開始･停止を設定し、運転状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether to start or stop the washing, drying or washing and drying cycle, and to acquire the current status.

descriptions.ja: 洗濯乾燥開始・再開／洗濯乾燥運転中
洗濯乾燥/洗濯/乾燥のコースを設定し、設定状態を取得する。各コース設定に、以下の範囲の領域を割り当てる洗濯乾燥コース：0x21 to 0x3F洗濯乾燥コースメーカオリジナルコード 0x40 to 0x4F洗濯コース：0x61 to 0x7F洗濯コースメーカオリジナルコード 0x80 to 0x8F乾燥コース：0xA1 to 0xBF乾燥コースメーカオリジナルコード 0xC0 to 0xCF
descriptions.en: Used to specify the washer and dryer cycle option(s) to use in the 'washing and drying,' 'washing' or 'drying' mode and to acquire the current setting(s). The value ranges shall be as follows: Washing and drying course: 0x21 to 0x3F, Washing and drying course maker original code: 0x40 to 0x4F, Washing course: 0x61 to 0x7F, Washing course maker original code: 0x80 to 0x8F, Drying course: 0xA1 to 0xBF, Drying course maker original code: 0xC0 to 0xDF
<Washing and drying course> Heavily soiled clothes

descriptions.ja: ＜洗濯乾燥コース＞しつこい汚れ
＜洗濯乾燥コース＞清潔すすぎ
＜洗濯乾燥コース＞アイロン／Yシャツ

descriptions.en: <Washing and drying course> Lightly soiled clothes

descriptions.ja: ＜洗濯乾燥コース＞少量短時間
descriptions.en: <Washing and drying course> Quick wash of small amount of laundry
<Washing course> Quick wash of small amount of laundry

descriptions.ja: ＜乾燥コース＞アイロン／Yシャツ

descriptions.en: <Drying course> User definition of drying time

remark.ja: 脚注参照、洗濯・乾燥のコース設定は洗濯乾燥コース設定1プロパティ (EPC=0xD0) によって行うか、あるいは洗濯乾燥コース設定2 プロパティ (EPC=0xD1) と乾燥コース設定プロパティ (EPC=0xD2) の組み合わせによって行う。機器には、どちらか一方のみを実装することとし、もう一方は実装してはならない。0x40 to 0x4F : 洗濯乾燥コース／メーカオリジナルコース, 0x80 to 0x8F : 洗濯コース／メーカオリジナルコース, 0xC0 to 0xCF : 乾燥コース／メーカオリジナルコース
remark.en: Refer to footnote, The washer and dryer cycle shall be specified either by the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 1' property (EPC = 0xD0) or by the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 2' property (EPC = 0xD1) combined with the 'drying cycle setting' property (EPC = 0xD2). Either the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 1' property or the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 2' and 'drying cycle setting' properties shall be implemented in the actual piece of equipment (the alternative shall not be implemented). 0x40 to 0x4F : Washing and drying course / maker original course, 0x80 to 0x8F : Washing course /  maker original course, 0xC0 to 0xCF : Drying course / maker original course.

descriptions.ja: 洗濯乾燥コースを設定し、設定状態を取得する。なお、乾燥方法の指定は、乾燥方法設定(EPC=0xD2)を使用するメーカオリジナルコード=0xE0 to 0xEF
descriptions.en: Used to specify the washer and dryer cycle option(s) to use in the 'washing and drying' mode, and to acquire the current setting(s). The drying option(s) to use shall be specified with the 'drying cycle setting' property (EPC = 0xD2). Maker original code = 0xE0 to 0xEF
Quick wash of small amount of laundry

remark.ja: 脚注参照、メーカオリジナルコード = 0xE0 to 0xEF、メーカオリジナルコース = 0xE0 to 0xEF
remark.en: Refer to footnote, Maker original code = 0xE0 to 0xEF, Maker original course = 0xE0 to 0xEF

descriptions.ja: 乾燥方法を設定し、設定状態を取得する。なお、洗濯乾燥コースの指定は、洗濯乾燥コース設定2(EPC=0xD1)を使用するメーカオリジナルコード=0xE0 to 0xEF
descriptions.en: Used to specify the drying cycle option(s) to use, and to acquire the current setting. For the 'washing and drying' mode, the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 2' property (EPC = 0xD1) shall be used. Maker original code = 0xE0 to 0xEF.

remark.ja: 脚注参照、メーカオリジナルコード＝0xE0 to 0xEF、メーカオリジナルコース＝0xE0 to 0xEF
remark.en: Refer to footnote, Maker original code = 0xE0 to 0xEF, Maker original course = 0xE0 to 0xEF

propertyName.en: Washer and dryer cycle option list 1

descriptions.ja: 洗濯乾燥コース設定1で、設定可能なコースをビットマップで取得する
descriptions.en: Used to acquire a bitmap list of the washer and dryer cycle options that can be specified with the 'washer and dryer cycle setting 1' property

remark.ja: ビットが1 の場合、対応するコースの設定が可能なことを、0 の場合は不可能なことを示す。ビットとコースの関係はPDFの詳細を参照のこと
remark.en: When the value contained in the bit for the desired washer and dryer cycle option is '1', the option can be specified. When the value contained in the bit for the desired washer and dryer cycle option is '0', the option cannot be specified. For the requirement as to which bit must be used for which option, refer to the detailed explanation in the PDF.

remark.en: When the value contained in the bit for the desired washer and dryer cycle option is '1', the option can be specified. When the value contained in the bit for the desired washer and dryer cycle option is '0', the option cannot be specified. For the requirement as to which bit must be used for which option, refer to the detailed explanation in the PDF.

When the value contained in the bit for the desired washer and dryer cycle option is '0', the option cannot be specified. descriptions.ja: すすぎモードをビットマップで設定し、設定状態を取得する。ビットとすすぎ回数の関係を以下に示す0,1,2,3ビット：第1すすぎ4,5,6,7ビット：第2すすぎ8,9,10,11ビット：第3すすぎ12,13,14,15ビット：第4すすぎ16,17,18,19ビット：第5すすぎ20,21,22,23ビット：第6すすぎ24,25,26,27ビット：第7すすぎ28,29,30,31ビット：第8すすぎ
descriptions.en: Used to specify the rinsing process(es) to use by means of a bitmap, and to acquire the current setting. Four bits are used to represent each rinsing process as follows:Bits 0 through bit 3: 1st rinsingBits 4 through bit 7: 2nd rinsingBits 8 through bit 11: 3rd rinsingBits 12 through bit 15: 4th rinsingBits 16 through bit 19: 5th rinsingBits 20 through bit 23: 6th rinsingBits 24 through bit 27: 7th rinsingBits 28 through bit 31: 8th rinsing

remark.en: Bits 0 through bit 3: 1st rinsing, Bits 4 through bit 7: 2nd rinsing, Bits 8 through bit 11: 3rd rinsing, Bits 12 through bit 15: 4th rinsing, Bits 16 through bit 19: 5th rinsing, Bits 20 through bit 23: 6th rinsing, Bits 24 through bit 27: 7th rinsing, Bits 28 through bit 31: 8th rinsing, 0000: Automatic mode, 0001: Rinsing without additional feeding of water from the tap, 0010: Rinsing with additional feeding of water from the tap, 0011: Shower rinsing

remark.ja: 第1,2 バイト：有効な表示項目をビットマップで示す。第3 バイト：つけおき行程 つけおき行程あり：0x41、つけおき行程なし：0x42。第4,5 バイト：洗い時間 値は洗い時間設定値を参照。第6 バイト：すすぎ回数 値はすすぎ回数設定値を参照。第7 to 10 バイト：すすぎモード 値はすすぎモード設定を参照。第11 バイト：脱水時間 値は脱水時間設定値を参照。第12, 13 バイト：乾燥時間 値は乾燥時間設定値を参照。第14 バイト：温水設定 値は温水設定を参照。第15 バイト：水量設定1 値は水量設定1を参照。第16 バイト：水量設定2 値は水量設定2を参照。第17 バイト：風呂水設定 値は風呂水設定を参照。第18 バイト：水流設定 値は水流設定を参照。第19,20 バイト：脱水回転数設定 値は脱水回転数設定値を参照。第21 バイト：乾燥度設定 値は乾燥度設定を参照。第22,23 バイト：つけおき行程時間設定 値はつけおき行程時間設定を参照。第24 バイト：ソフトキープ設定 値はソフトキープ設定を参照
remark.en: This property indicates the available items in a bitmap format. Byte 3: Presoaking, With presoaking: 0x41, Without presoaking: 0x42. Bytes 4 and 5: Washing time, The value of the 'washing time setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 6: Number of times of rinsing, The value of the 'number of times of rinsing' setting property shall be referenced. Bytes 7 through 10: Rinsing process, The value of the 'rinsing process setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 11: Spin drying time, The value of the 'spin drying time setting' property shall be referenced. Bytes 12 and 13: Drying time, The value of the 'drying time setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 14: Warm water setting, The value of the 'warm water setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 15: Water volume setting 1, The value of the 'water volume setting 1' property shall be referenced. Byte 16: Water volume setting 2, The value of the 'water volume setting 2' property shall be referenced. Byte 17: Bathtub water recycle setting, The value of the 'bathtub water recycle setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 18: Water flow rate setting, The value of the 'water flow rate setting' property shall be referenced. Bytes 19 and 20: 'Rotation speed for spin drying' setting, The value of the ''rotation speed for spin drying' setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 21: 'Degree of drying' setting, The value of the ''degree of drying' setting' property shall be referenced. Bytes 22 and 23: Presoaking time setting, The value of the 'presoaking time setting' property shall be referenced. Byte 24: Wrinkling minimization setting, The value of the 'wrinkling minimization setting' property shall be referenced.

propertyName.en: Character string to present to the user

descriptions.ja: ユーザに伝達するべき文字列、その伝達文字列長及び使用文字コードを設定し、設定保持値を取得する。伝達文字バイト列データ長を最上位バイトに、次バイトに使用文字コード、次バイトは0x00(for future reserved),次に伝達文字列先頭バイト、伝達文字列末尾バイトを最下位バイトに設定する
descriptions.en: Sets the character string to present to the user, the length of the character string and the character code to use to present the character string and acquires the stored setting.The highest-order byte shall indicate the byte sequence data length of the character string to present to the user and the second-highest-order byte shall indicate the character code to use. The second-highest-order byte shall be followed by a byte containing '0x00' (reserved for future use), which shall be followed by a number of bytes, each assigned with one of the first and succeeding bytes, starting with the first byte, of the character string to present to the user. The lowest-order byte shall be assigned with the last byte of the character string to present to the user.

elementName.ja: 伝達文字バイトコード列データ長の16 進換算値

descriptions.en: This property indicates the ON/OFF status.
This property indicates the installation location

remark.ja: bitmap(例 0x00: 未設定(初期値), 0x08: リビング)
remark.en: bitmap (eg. 0x00: undefined (initial data), 0x08: living)

descriptions.en: This property indicates the installation location

remark.ja: 1byte bitmap(例 0x00: 未設定(初期値), 0x08: リビング)または0x01で始まる17 byte data
remark.en: 1byte bitmap (eg. 0x00: undefined (initial data), 0x08: living) or 17 bytes data starting from 0x01

descriptions.ja: 対応するAPPENDIXのリリース番号を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the release number of the corresponding Appendix.

remark.ja: 1,2バイト目は0x00。3バイト目は機器オブジェクトのリリースバージョンをASCIIで表す。リリース Aのみ小文字で0x61, B以降は大文字で0x42, 0x43...。4バイト目は、そのリリースバージョンのリビジョン番ををASCIIで表す(0x00～0xFF)。
remark.en: 1st and 2nd data is 0x00. 3rd data is the release version of Device Object in ASCII. Only release A utilize lower case letter 0x61, Release B and later utilize upper case letter such as 0x42, 0x43... 4th data is the revision number of the release version in ASCII (0x00 - 0xFF).

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを固有に識別する番号
descriptions.en: A number that allows each object to be uniquely identified.

remark.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2～4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値
remark.en: 1st data is 0xFE. 2nd to 4th data is manufacture code. The rest should be unique to each device.

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを固有に識別する番号
descriptions.en: A number that allows each object to be uniquely identified.

remark.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2～4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値

descriptions.ja: 機器の瞬時消費電力をWで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the instantaneous power consumption of the device in watts.

propertyName.ja: 積算消費電力量計測値

descriptions.en: This property indicates the cumulative electric energy consumption of the device in increments of 0.001kWh.

descriptions.ja: 各メーカ独自の異常コードを示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the manufacturer-defined fault code.

descriptions.ja: 電流制限の設定値を示す(0～100%)
descriptions.en: This property indicates the current limit setting (0 to 100%).

descriptions.ja: 何らかの異常(センサトラブル等)の発生状況を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether a fault (e.g. a sensor trouble) has occurred or not.

descriptions.ja: 3バイトの事業場コードで指定

descriptions.en: Identifies the product using ASCII code.
This property indicates the production number using ASCII code.

descriptions.ja: 機器の節電動作状態を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether the device is operating in power-saving mode.

descriptions.ja: 公衆回線を介した操作か否かを示す。(0x41、0x42)通信回線の状態が正常か否かを示す。(0x61、0x62)
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether remote control is through a public network or not. (0x41, 0x42)This property indicates whether the status of the communication line is normal or not. (0x61, 0x62)

descriptions.ja: 公衆回線を介した操作か否かを示す。(0x41、0x42)通信回線の状態が正常か否かを示す。(0x61、0x62)
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether remote control is through a public network or not. (0x41, 0x42)This property indicates whether the status of the communication line is normal or not. (0x61, 0x62)

descriptions.ja: 通信回線正常(公衆回線経由の操作不可)
descriptions.en: Communication line is normal. (operation through a public network is not possible.)

descriptions.ja: 通信回線正常(公衆回線経由の操作可能)
descriptions.en: Communication line is normal. (operation through a public network is possible.)

descriptions.ja: 電力制限の設定値をWで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the power limit setting in watts.

descriptions.ja: 現在までの運転時間の積算値を単位1バイト、時間4バイトで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the cumulative number of days, hours, minutes or seconds for which the device has operated, using 1 byte for the unit and 4 bytes for the time.

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. See Annex 1 of the Appendix.
